query:
-- Check user account
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.phone, u.role 
FROM users u
WHERE u.email = 'fergusgosson@gmail.com';

-- Check driver profile
SELECT d.id, d.user_id, d.vehicle_type, d.vehicle_number, d.license_number, d.is_online, d.is_available
FROM drivers d
JOIN users u ON d.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'fergusgosson@gmail.com';
